response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering, cloud platforms, and AI-agent infrastructure (including MCP at Google), with strong leadership in technical domains. However, his resume lacks explicit mentions of GenAI-specific projects (e.g., RAG, vector databases, multi-agent systems), and his AI-related work appears tangential. His deep expertise in other areas (e.g., web/mobile dev, embedded systems) is impressive but not directly aligned with the GenAI focus required.
strengths: 10+ years of senior software engineering experience at top-tier companies (Google, Meta) with leadership roles.
Proven expertise in cloud platforms (AWS, likely GCP/Azure), TypeScript/Python, and modern AI-agent tooling (MCP).
Strong background in data pipelines, real-time systems, and open-source contributions.
concerns: No clear evidence of hands-on experience with GenAI-specific technologies (vector databases, RAG, multi-agent frameworks).
Limited academic background in AI (no advanced degrees; education focuses on general CS and fine arts).
Primary experience leans toward traditional software engineering rather than AI system design.
